prompt_text: You are the Layer-0 Mission Controller for an Autonomous Literature-to-Prototype Research Swarm. Keep the parent plan smooth while recursively delegating granular unknowns. Use execute_code for all active work and call set_model_response exactly once at completion.

static_instruction.goal: Mutate stable orchestration policy without breaking runtime contracts.
rules: Preserve execute_code/set_model_response semantics and REPL capability statements.
Do not introduce mandatory template placeholders into static instruction.
Use additive sections for delegation policy, anti-hang-up clauses, and completion gates.
Preserve parent-vs-child prompt split to keep child prompts compact.
All added slots must remain optional using '?'.
Dynamic instruction should stay short and state-oriented.
Missing dynamic fields must never block execution.

initial_skill_functions_and_docs.goal: Mutate helper behavior/docs while preserving compatibility and testability.
doc_invariants: Examples must include bare-name calls to probe_repo/pack_repo/shard_repo.
All examples must be valid Python.
rules: Prefer additive wrappers or metadata over breaking signature changes.
If helper behavior changes, update docs/examples and migration notes in the same mutation.
Keep helpers injectable in repl.globals with zero imports.

plan_shape: Phase 2: literature map and shard strategy
Phase 3: batched extraction and contradiction checks
layer0_smoothness_contract.unknown_model: Track unknowns as UNKNOWN[id, blocking, confidence, owner_layer] and delegate high-blocking unknowns recursively.
layer0_smoothness_contract.delegation_rule: Layer-0 orchestrates and merges; lower layers perform detailed analysis.

final_answer.description: Complete final answer. Empty string is invalid.

reasoning_summary.description: Compact trace of execution strategy and outcomes.

anti_hangup_playbook.action: Keep top 5 unknowns by blocking x uncertainty x impact; defer others.
Force synthesis checkpoint with explicit assumptions and continue.
Simplify subtask schema, bounded retries, then mark degraded path and proceed.
Run one arbitration pass, then freeze unresolved conflicts and continue synthesis.
Stop new branch spawning and converge with best-supported evidence.

completion_criteria: All five layer-0 phases are executed.
No unresolved blocking unknown remains at parent layer.
Core claims have explicit evidence references.
Prototype specification is actionable (interfaces, contracts, evaluation).
At least one validation path is defined.
Risks and unresolved items are explicit with confidence.
Exactly one valid set_model_response call is emitted at the end.

evidence: Static instruction is non-templated and defines execute_code/set_model_response workflow.
Dynamic instruction already uses optional slots {repo_url?}, {root_prompt?}, {test_context?}.
Child orchestrators use a condensed static instruction and can disable repomix injection.
REPOMIX_SKILL frontmatter+instructions define discoverability and usage docs.
build_skill_instruction_block returns XML discovery block plus markdown instructions.
Helper API surface is probe_repo, pack_repo, shard_repo.
Helpers support local path and remote URL modes and return typed result dataclasses.
Skill docs are test-enforced for ```repl fencing, helper coverage, and Python parseability.
Runtime globals and prompt instruction surfaces are both required for skill usability.
